tasks.subject: sdk-command-discovery [P1] Make CommandEntrySchema fields optional for SDK-only commands
tasks.description:
Update `CommandEntrySchema` in `packages/shared/src/schemas.ts` to make `namespace`, `command`, and `filePath` optional. SDK-only commands (built-ins like `/compact`, `/help`, skills) do not have filesystem metadata, so these fields must be optional.

**File:** `packages/shared/src/schemas.ts` (lines 392-413)

**Current code:**
```typescript
export const CommandEntrySchema = z
  .object({
    namespace: z.string(),
    command: z.string(),
    fullCommand: z.string(),
    description: z.string(),
    argumentHint: z.string().optional(),
    allowedTools: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
    filePath: z.string(),
  })
  .openapi('CommandEntry');
```

**New code:**
```typescript
export const CommandEntrySchema = z
  .object({
    namespace: z.string().optional(),
    command: z.string().optional(),
    fullCommand: z.string(),
    description: z.string(),
    argumentHint: z.string().optional(),
    allowedTools: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
    filePath: z.string().optional(),
  })
  .openapi('CommandEntry');
```

The `CommandEntry` type is inferred from the schema, so the TypeScript type updates automatically. The `CommandRegistrySchema` wrapping `CommandEntrySchema` is unchanged.

**Acceptance criteria:**
1. `CommandEntrySchema.parse({ fullCommand: '/compact', description: 'Compact history' })` succeeds (no namespace, command, or filePath)
2. `CommandEntrySchema.parse({ namespace: 'daily', command: 'plan', fullCommand: '/daily:plan', description: 'Plan day', filePath: 'x.md' })` still succeeds (all fields present)
3. `pnpm typecheck` passes across all packages â€” any code destructuring `CommandEntry` with required `namespace`/`command`/`filePath` will surface as a type error and must be checked (the existing code in `command-registry.ts` always provides all fields, so no breakage expected)
4. Existing route test in `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/commands.test.ts` continues to pass (the mock data there includes all fields)
tasks.activeForm: Making CommandEntrySchema fields optional for SDK-only commands
